prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM X25XE 2.5L V6 (L81)** with forged internals (Mahle pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a custom **Garrett GT2860RS** turbo kit (Tial 44mm wastegate, 3.5-inch stainless downpipe) tuned via **HP Tuners VCM Suite** for 320whp on E85 (stock block limit ~350whp).

Full **KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers** with adjustable camber plates (custom top mounts for Magnus strut towers) paired with **Whiteline 24mm adjustable rear sway bar** and **SuperPro poly bushings** (front control arms, subframe, diff mounts) to eliminate torque steer under boost.

Custom **3-inch stainless exhaust system** with **Borla Pro XS mufflers** (resonated for cabin comfort) and a **Tial 50mm BOV** (recirculated to avoid CEL) mated to a **MagnaFlow 2.5-inch high-flow catalytic converter** for emissions compliance in select markets.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 Magnus-specific widebody kit** (custom fender flares, carbon fiber front splitter, and duckbill rear wing) with **APR Performance GT-250 side skirts** for aggressive stance (requires 5mm spacers on stock hubs for fitment).

**OEM Daewoo Magnus J-Spec headlights** (clear lens, HID projector retrofit with **Morimoto XB35 bulbs**) and **Depo Racing JDM-style taillights** (LED conversion, sequential turn signals) for a Euro-JDM hybrid aesthetic.

**Enkei PF05 18x9.5 +35 wheels** (ET35 offset, 245/40/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires) with **BC Racing BR coilover sleeves** for aggressive fender gap reduction (requires mild fender rolling on rear arches).
